item.title:
TomasORuanaidh: Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 1h It'll be a fun week on the #GAA beat.
Recording The Football Pod Monday morning w/ Ja
item.description:
Tommy Rooney @TomasORuanaidh · 1h It'll be a fun week on the #GAA beat.
Recording The Football Pod Monday morning w/ James & Paddy
Ep. 2 of our brand new Gaelic Football Power Rankings show with Harvey Norman is out Tuesday
Also presenting @offtheball , 7-10pm, Tuesday night all of that and plenty more 1 1 3 931

item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 1h Ciarán Whelan on the difficulties facing Dublin without Ger Brennan being centrally involved - but
item.description: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 1h Ciarán Whelan on the difficulties facing Dublin without Ger Brennan being centrally involved - but adds that 'there is no point crying over spilt week' #rtegaa #sundaygame 2 5 2 mil

item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 1h Ciarán Whelan on the difficulties facing Dublin without Ger Brennan being centrally
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 1h Ciarán Whelan on the difficulties facing Dublin without Ger Brennan being centrally involved - but adds that 'there is no point crying over spilt week' #rtegaa #sundaygame 1 4 2 mil

item.title: The42_ie: The42.ie GAA reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 2h Meath dumped out of Leinster championship with two-point defeat in Tullamo
item.description: The42.ie GAA reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 2h Meath dumped out of Leinster championship with two-point defeat in Tullamore De the42.ie 1 2 3 mil

item.title: The42_ie: The42.ie GAA reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 2h Defending Leinster football champions Louth set up a May bank holiday week
item.description: The42.ie GAA reposteó The42.ie @The42_ie · 2h Defending Leinster football champions Louth set up a May bank holiday weekend semi-final against Dublin by comfortably dispatching Wexford in Carlow De the42.ie 1 3 mil
